name: aindrive
description: Your local folder, served like Google Drive — with x402 paywalls, A2A agent access, and Willow CRDT collaboration.

scripts.build: cd web && node_modules/.bin/next build && mkdir -p ../dist && cp -r .next/standalone/. ../dist/ && mkdir -p ../dist/.next && cp -r .next/static ../dist/.next/static && cp -r public ../dist/public 2>/dev/null || true
